home about contact

consultancy for your AI and digital needs.

Practical AI systems, crypto strategy, and delivery leadership for founders and operators.

executive ai consulting

A practical consulting offer for founders and operators who want AI systems, crypto strategy, and delivery support without the usual hype or technical noise.

Agentic AI systems

I design and implement practical OpenClaw and agent workflows across local models, hosted APIs, Linux and Windows environments, and business automation.

Typical outcome: a stable assistant or operator setup that actually helps in day-to-day work.

From: FREE discovery, then $4,999 guided setup or $9,999 full implementation.

Crypto strategy

Grounded help for people who want to understand the crypto landscape, improve their setup, and make better decisions with clearer risk controls.

Typical outcome: a sensible starting plan, security setup, and portfolio structure aligned to real goals.

From: FREE intro, $499 strategy session, $1,999 tailored setup.

Delivery leadership

Structured programme and project leadership for organisations that need calm execution, tighter stakeholder management, and clearer outcomes.

Typical outcome: a stronger roadmap, cleaner delivery rhythm, and improved accountability.

Availability: consulting and contract engagements by discussion.

How klab is positioned

This version moves the page closer to a premium consulting layout: one clear hero promise, three commercial service pillars, stronger pricing anchors, and less text clutter than the earlier copy-only pass.

The next refinement could add proof points, client examples, and one visual process strip.

Use LinkedIn as the proof anchor while the rest of the page is tightened for conversion.

get in touch

If any of these services are relevant, book a free initial call and I’ll help you work out the fastest, most sensible next step.
